QA-07 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa07 modal has dialog role
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa07_modal_has_dialog_role 🕐 2026-05-25 04:21:56 ⏱ 15.86s
📋 What this test was checking
Login modal must use role='dialog' for screen reader accessibility — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Login modal must use role='dialog' for screen reader accessibility.
✗ What actually happened
The test waited for an element to appear on the page, but it never appeared within 12000ms.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None
E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.wait_for_selector: Timeout 12000ms exceeded.
E   Call log:
E     - waiting for locator("[role=\"dialog\"], [aria-modal=\"true\"], [class*=\"modal-content\"]") to be visible

    self._sync(

BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
EN/AR language toggle buttons must have correct aria-labels.
✗ What actually happened
English button missing aria-label='English'
